name: FIRST NATIONAL CORP /VA/
summary: First National Corporation is a Virginia-chartered bank holding company that owns First Bank, a commercial bank operating 33 branch offices, one loan production office, and a customer service center. The Bank offers consumer loans, residential mortgages, home equity loans, commercial loans, deposit products (checking, savings, money market, CDs, IRAs), treasury management, and wealth management services including estate planning and investment management, serving individuals, small and medium-sized businesses, non-profits, and local governmental entities in Virginia and northern North Carolina.

products.name: Consumer Loans
products.description: Personal lending products including consumer loans and residential mortgages.

products.name: Home Equity Loans
products.description: Loans secured by residential real estate equity.

products.name: Commercial Loans
products.description: Lending products for small and medium-sized businesses.

products.name: Deposit Accounts
products.description: Checking, savings, money market, CDs, IRAs, and treasury management solutions.

products.name: Wealth Management Services
products.description: Estate planning, investment management, trustee services, and estate settlement.

products.name: Mobile Banking Platform
products.description: Digital banking delivery channel via mobile app and website fbvirginia.com.

products.name: ATM Network
products.description: Network of ATMs located throughout the Bank's market area.

partnerships.description: Bank subsidiary holding an interest in an entity that provides title insurance services.
